# External — not SILO product

Bookmark here; **never** in `silo-chrome.js` or finance hub.

| System | URL / notes |
|--------|-------------|
| **Power BI** — sales dashboard | [Power BI view](https://app.powerbi.com/view?r=eyJrIjoiY2U0MWI2ZmMtMTY3MS00MDY3LTg5NjctN2VlYjk0NGMxNzUzIiwidCI6IjIzYTkzNDJkLTFjODEtNGJkNS1hY2U0LThmYWY4ZWVlNTZiZCJ9) — stays external until native exec/sales reporting replaces it |
| **WPV receivables** | `/wpvaccounts.html` — separate instance, not SILO |
| **Cash reconciliation** (Google Form) | Keep external for now |
| **Bars requests** (Jotform) | Separate Bars product; retiring from SILO |
| **Weebly analytics portal** | Old platform — see [remove/](../remove/README.md) |
